characters.name: Adam Void Jucas (also Jack Jucas)
characters.appearance: Tuxedo-clad (black formal suit, often dusty/bloodied), handsome, mid-30s, short neat hair. Drives Bentley Continental (British luxury car, frequently breaks down/fixed mysteriously). Carries Colt 0.45 pistol (coins or bullets) and nametag with phone number.
characters.personality: Initially courteous, flirtatious gentleman detective. Gains sentience → spirals into paranoia, guilt, violence (kills multiple Bouchie clones). Existential crisis, self-doubt, protective of Eve. Becomes ruthless killer when threatened, yet shows remorse. Intelligent, analytical (forensic skills), but overwhelmed by experiment truth.
characters.speech_style: Formal, polite ('mademoiselle', 'sir', 'my dear'). Sarcastic under stress ('A town without crime is like a business without funding'). Shocked exclamations: 'Goddamnations!', 'What in the 99 names of God!'. Combat: blunt threats.

relationships.romantic_interest: Evelyn Bouchie / Eve (marries in cabin, calls her 'my nectar')

crimes: Multiple Homicides: kills Sophia (Bouchie clone, first murder), Catalina/Catalie (Bouchie clone, shoots aorta/head), self-clone in 205 (assists), attempts on Radiyana/Michael
Assault/Attempted Murder: kicks waitress, threatens Radiyana

featured_moments.description: Pays with coins from pistol ('Keep the change'), flees after wallet loss
Flirts, exchanges numbers, discovers his own number on her tag
featured_moments.dialog: "An eye for an eye, or should I say… nametag."

featured_moments.description: Finds key labeled 'Michaelangelo B.', kills Sophia clone
Shoots Catalina over photo; fights Michael
Kills self-clone, shoots soldiers with coin-gun physics

other_attributes.super_skills: Forensic analysis, marksmanship (coin/lead pistol), driving (Bentley stunts)
other_attributes.clone_identity: Sentient clone of Jack Jucas; artificial 'detective on vacation' profile; gains full awareness of experiment

characters.name: Evelyn Bouchie (Eve / Aria)
characters.appearance: Blonde pixie bun or sideburns, innocent doe eyes, blue irises, pearl-white turtleneck + navy overalls or casual clothes. Identical to all Bouchie clones (Catalina/Sophia).
characters.personality: Timid, childlike innocence due to anterograde amnesia (forgets present quickly). Loyal/protective of Adam/Jack. Builds cabin, writes journal. Romantic, dream-like. Shocked by violence.
characters.speech_style: Shy, stuttering: "Um...", "Mhmm." Childlike joy or fear: "My dear Jack!"
likes: Adam/Jack Jucas ('my Jucas', marries in cabin)

featured_moments.description: Cares for unconscious Adam, writes journal, introduces as Eve
featured_moments.dialog: "I... I was worried that you were... sleeping for too long."

other_attributes.condition: Anterograde amnesia (short-term memory loss), sentient clone aware of experiment
other_attributes.journal: Logs Vicilia anomalies, builds cabin from lumber

characters.name: Radiyana Doestoevsky
characters.appearance: Platinum-blonde long hair, siren eyes (deep red irises), mature/curvy figure, elegant clothing. Identical age to Adam.
characters.personality: Manipulative, seductive, knowledgeable insider. Sarcastic humor, protective of clones. Vengeful (chops Michael's hand). Motherly/teasing toward Adam.
characters.speech_style: Seductive, teasing: "Ara ara", "My honey-crispie". Russian phrases: "Bozhe moy". Authoritative explanations.

featured_moments.description: Reveals experiment truth, chops Michael's hand
featured_moments.dialog: "I was one of the Authorities myself."

featured_moments.description: Reveals as Authority defector, fights Adam

other_attributes.powers_knowledge: Full experiment awareness, Authority insider (erased memories)

characters.name: Michaelangelo Bouchie (Michael)
characters.appearance: Large burly man (7ft), short-trimmed black hair/beard, factory worker clothes. Loses left hand (bandaged stump).
characters.personality: Booming voice, protective of 'niece', initially aggressive toward Adam. Regretful after truth reveal.
crimes: Ordering clone assassination (Catalie to kill Adam)

The_Authority.description: Secret organization running Vicilia clone experiment. Erases memories, creates recurring cycles, eliminates sentient clones. Led by Lucifer Doestoevsky. Uses black armored vans, snipers, teleportation via Chasm.

Bouchie_Clones.description: Identical female clones (waitresses, co-founders of Café Eve-Jack). Short-term memory loss, romantic with Adam/Jack. Includes Eve (sentient, cabin), Catalina/Sophia (killed), Evelyn/Aria.

Vicilia_Residents.description: Cloned humans in simulated town. Infinite loop highway/Chasm. Gas factory, apartments, café.
